title: mcp-fit Task Trace
description: One JSON object per line in evals.jsonl — a task execution trace from the dynamic eval runner.

taskId.description: Unique task identifier from the corpus.

multiStep.description: True when the task requires ≥2 sequential tool calls. Multi-step tasks carry the signal weight.

lowSignal.description: True when the task is a trivial single-call. Flagged per the selectivity principle — does not dominate the aggregate.

pass.description: Whether the agent completed the task successfully.

tokenCost.description: Total tokens consumed by the agent during this task. Null when the harness cannot measure token usage (e.g. ACP agents — ADR-G); null means not-measured, never zero.

chosenTools.description: Ordered list of tool names the agent called, in call order.

provenanceEvents.description: Provenance events for agent-supplied arguments. Fabricated events feed the v1.1 data-provenance axis.

degraded.description: True when the harness could not fully observe the run (optional; absent means false). Degraded traces should not feed before/after claims (ADR-G).

ProvenanceEvent.description: Records whether an agent-supplied argument was traceable to prior context or was fabricated.

type.description: fabricated = hallucinated value; traced = derived from a prior tool return; literal = task-provided constant.

tool.description: Tool call where this provenance event occurred.

param.description: Parameter name the event is associated with.

value.description: The argument value (any type; omit to save space).

RubricResult.description: Result from the contract-rubric judge loop (spec §Scorecard, ADR-B).

score.description: Ordinal 1–10 quality score from the rubric judge.

round.description: Round at which scoring completed — early-stop at 10 or patience exhausted.
